title: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities 36 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Deafness Fathers Men Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE BROOKINGS MENTAL HEALTH CARE AND SUBSTANCE USE TREATMENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders. Services include medical detox, residential care, day treatment, outpatient treatment, after care, and medication-assisted treatment. Provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 615 5th Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (877) 408-8941 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE DEER CREEK YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders from residential care to outpatient treatment and after care. Also provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. Eligibility: Youth with addiction and/or co-occurring mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 673-5119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE GOLD BEACH MENTAL HEALTH CARE AND SUBSTANCE USE TREATMENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders. Services include medical detox, residential care, day treatment, outpatient treatment, after care, and medication-assisted treatment. Provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 29845 Airport Way Gold Beach, OR 97444 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (877) 408-8941 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE PORT ORFORD MENTAL HEALTH CARE AND SUBSTANCE USE TREATMENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders. Services include medical detox, residential care, day treatment, outpatient treatment, after care, and medication-assisted treatment. Provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 1403 Oregon Street Port Orford, OR 97465 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment (877) 408-8941 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ROSEBURG DETOXIFICATION ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders that includes medical detox, residential care, and after care. 3099 NE Diamond Lake Boulvard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Most services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication-assisted treatment: 7 days per week 6:30am-2:30pm, by appointment only (541) 492-0206 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers medically monitored detoxification, chemical dependency treatment and supports, pain management, and mental health services. Planned regimen of professionally directed evaluation, observation, and addiction treatment in an inpatient setting. 1025 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-1282 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES ADDICTION MEDICINE CLINIC RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 685 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 668-9070 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES KLAMATH FALLS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 2555 Main Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 883-2795 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES REDMOND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 676 NE Maple Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 504-9577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BLANCHET HOUSE OF HOSPITALITY BLANCHET HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 7-9 month residential living program with case management services. Residents start with in-house work programs and progress to securing stable, independent employment. Residents must maintain sobriety for the duration of the program. 310 NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are in recovery from substance abuse issues. Individuals with convictions for arson or sex offenses are not allowed into the program. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 337-8747 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH OUTPATIENT CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services, inpatient and outpatient chemical dependency treatment, and substance use disorder counseling. Treatment incorporates individual, group, and family counseling. Additional assistance includes DUII services, adolescent services, corrections services, smoking cessation, and primary medical care. 750 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 13 and older Hours: Intake hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Program hours vary Email (503) 363-2021 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITYTEAM RECOVERY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers long-term (average of 6 months) residential substance use disorder treatment to men struggling with addiction. Includes individual case management, recovery-based classes, community involvement, and other services. Also offers up to 24 months of optional additional residential-housing after-care. 526 SE Grand Avenue Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who are struggling with addiction. Low-barrier program. Barriers preventing access to services include: possessing an SO, needing medically assisted treatment, needing a dual-diagnosis facility. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Facility: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 318-7794 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITYTEAM RESTORATIVE RESIDENTIAL WOMEN'S PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term residential substance use disorder treatment including individual case management, recovery-based classes, community involvement, and other services. Program stays typically last about 6 months but participants will have the option of an additional 24 month program. Eligibility: Women age 18 and older who self-identify as having a substance use disorder. This program is not suitable for clients who need medically assisted or dual diagnosis treatments or have a sex offender conviction. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 231-9334 4180 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-specific residential treatment. Primary goals include recovery, self-management, obtaining employment and housing, building a support network, and helping individuals not to relapse into a previous bad habit or criminal behavior. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 17911 NW Evergreen Place Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older; accepts patients with cases in child welfare or criminal justice systems Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 733-2632 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific services for women, including those who are pregnant and parenting, and women involved with child welfare or criminal justice systems. Treatment supports women as they work on parenting in recovery and building and supporting safe and stable families and homes. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 17911 NW Evergreen Place Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA GRESHAM RECOVERY CENTER WOMEN’S AND MEN’S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-specific residential treatment. Primary goals include recovery, self-management, obtaining employment and housing, building a support network, and helping individuals not to relapse into a previous bad habit or criminal behavior. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 1427 SE 182nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older; accepts patients with cases in child welfare or criminal justice systems Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 761-6006 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA GRESHAM RECOVERY CENTER WOMEN’S AND MEN’S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific services for women, including those who are pregnant and parenting, and women involved with child welfare or criminal justice systems. Treatment supports women as they work on parenting in recovery and building and supporting safe and stable families and homes. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 1427 SE 182nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older; may include patients with cases in child welfare or criminal justice systems. Children may stay with their mothers on site. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 761-6005 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CODA TIGARD RECOVERY CENTER MEN'S RESIDENTIAL MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-specific residential treatment. Primary goals include recovery, self-management, obtaining employment and housing, building a support network, and helping individuals not to relapse into a previous bad habit or criminal behavior. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 10362 SW McDonald Street Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older; accepts patients with cases in child welfare or criminal justice systems Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 624-8304 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES DADS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential alcohol and drug treatment for up to 10 men with children. Services may include individual and group counseling, case management, life skills education, parenting support, health screening, child care, and other support services. Eligibility: Fathers with children younger than age 5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 779-2003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES MOUNTAIN VIEW RECOVERY MOUNTAIN VIEW RECOVERY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential alcohol and drug treatment for up to 16 adults. Services may include individual and group counseling, case management, life skills education, parenting education, health screening/monitoring, and other ancillary programming. 900 Hitching Post Road Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 200-2403 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON ALCOHOLISM FOUNDATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential and outpatient treatment for adults with drug and/or alcohol addictions. Provides evaluations for people arrested for DUIs, Minor in Possession (MIP) information classes, two transitional living facilities (one for men, one for women and children), and alcohol- and drug-free apartments for those who have successfully completed treatment. The residential program includes a child development program for men, women, and their children. 216 SW Hailey Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who meet criteria for residential alcohol and drug addiction treatment. Mothers and single fathers referred by DHS Child Welfare may have children approved to reside with them. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 278-2558 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FORA HEALTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific residential substance abuse treatment programs with integrated mental health services for clients. Also offers family therapy, dual diagnosis, and medically monitored residential treatments. 10230 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with primary diagnosis of alcohol or drug addictive disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 535-1151 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS EAST VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 11719 NE 95th Street Suite A/D Vancouver, WA 98682 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Appointments: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication Assisted Recovery (MAR) rapid response: Monday-Friday 9am-11am Email (360) 984-5511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS VA CAMPUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 1601 E Fourth Plain Boulevard Suite A212 Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some outpatient programs are available for the Deaf or hard of hearing Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Detox: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Assessments: Monday-Thursday noon-3pm MAR Rapid Response: Wednesday 9am-11am Email (360) 397-8246 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a residential program offering co-occurring mental health, trauma, and substance use recovery services. Programming is centered around building skills in emotional regulation, resiliency, conflict resolution, and communication. 7000 SW Varns Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 749-0200 528 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES GRESHAM YOUTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific residential treatment services. 620 NE 2nd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 12-17. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 953-6598 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CENTER ADULT RESIDENTIAL ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Residential treatment center providing a range of services to support individuals in recovery from substance abuse. Treatment model is based on the Medicine Wheel, integrating health (wellness), mental health, sobriety, and culture. Children up to age 5 can stay with the client. 17645 NW St Helens Highway Portland, OR 97231 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Treatment Center: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 621-1069 Visit Website More Details NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC BAKER HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM MEN'S & WOMEN'S BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Baker House is a 90-day residential treatment facility that provides detoxification for alcohol and drug addiction, including treatment for methamphetamine, opiates, alcohol and other drugs of abuse. Treatment is individualized and client centered, using evidence based practices. Treatment plans emphasize stages of change, motivational enhancement, cognitive thinking errors, relapse prevention planning, and individual, group, and family counseling. 3700 Midway Drive (Men) 3610 Midway Drive (Women) Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 523-8320 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR SHEPHERD'S DOOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Portland Rescue Mission offers healing and life growth through Christian-based, trauma-informed care. At Shepherd's Door, up to 42 women and mothers with their children overcome substance use disorders, and work towards self-sufficiency in a retreat-like setting. Shepherd's Door residential programs begin with Discovery, a 5-week assessment, stabilization, and relapse prevention program. Discovery graduates are eligible to enter New Life, a one-year holistic recovery program. Onsite child care and programming for children is provided along with parenting support. Transition programs are available upon completion of New Life. 13207 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older and women with children age 10 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 746-9743 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION THE HARBOR THE HARBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based residential substance abuse treatment. The residential program can accommodate up to 38 men in a retreat-like setting. Residential programs begin with a 5-week assessment, stabilization, and relapse prevention program. On completion, graduates are eligible to enter a one-year holistic recovery program. Transition programs are available upon completion of a one-year holistic recovery program. 10336 NE Wygant Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk-in hours: Tuesday/Thursday 11am-1pm: Bunside Center: 111 W Burnside Street, Portland, Oregon, 97209 Email (503) 746-9664 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES PRINEVILLE YOUTH RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential treatment for youth with substance use and mental health needs. Youth live in a coeducational setting for 50 days or longer. Focuses on building coping and life skills, preventing relapse, improving relationships, and managing emotions and stress. Youth receive individual counseling, attend daily group therapy, continue their education on site, and take part in daily chores, sports, and activities. Additional supports include access to a gym, weight room, rock climbing wall, equine therapy, and art therapy. 1333 NW 9th Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Ages 12-17 Hours: Main Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program: Staffed 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 447-2631 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAMARITAN HEALTH SERVICES SAMARITAN TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES - NEWPORT TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for substance use disorders in both residential and outpatient settings. Residential program may have a waitlist and outpatient clients may receive priority. 5840 NW Biggs Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program hours: Varies by service (541) 451-6388 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION ANGELA'S HOUSE LIFECHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based transitional housing. Guests will have access to their own room, meals, an education center, a children's activity center, a commercial kitchen, a counseling center, and a chapel. 18555 NW Rock Creek Boulevard Portland, OR 97229 Eligibility: Men and women (including women with children) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 802-2271 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION LIFECHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This faith-based program is an addiction recovery community providing a long-term residential drug and alcohol recovery program for people who are willing to make a long-term commitment. Goal-oriented recovery program, not time-based. Program provides for all personal needs, food, clothing, housing, and hygiene products. Requirements include work, participation in religious activities and educational programs. 3 NW Third Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men and women (including women with children) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 274-4483 629 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEERS OF AMERICA OREGON MEN'S RESIDENTIAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A 54-bed drug and alcohol residential treatment facility for men. The six month residency consists of intensive, tightly structured treatment in which a therapeutic relationship with MRC counselors will be fostered. Additional six month non-residency continuing care is also offered. Hosts Stepping Up meetings to explore the 12 steps, which are open to members of the community who are in recovery. 2318 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Residential services are for men involved in the Criminal Justice System. Meetings are open to male identifying members of the recovery community. Hours: Residential Services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meetings: Call for upcoming meetings times (503) 235-8655 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEERS OF AMERICA OREGON VOA OREGON OUTPATIENT SERVICES HOME BASE RECOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clean and sober housing and addiction treatment. Participants in the program agree to attend treatment while being provided with monitored housing, recovery mentors, and addiction and mental health counseling. 10564 SE Washington Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Must be in recovery from alcohol or drug addiction Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 227-6092 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC WILLAMETTE FAMILY SUNRISE HOUSE & FAMILIES IN RECOVERY WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential substance abuse treatment. Eligibility: Females age 18 and and female individuals with children ages 0-5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 762-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ADDICTION SERVICES ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ADDICTION SERVICES ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ADDICTION SERVICES ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ADDICTION SERVICES ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT BLANCHET HOUSE OF HOSPITALITY BLANCHET HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT CITYTEAM RECOVERY PROGRAM CODA MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CODA MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CODA MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES MOUNTAIN VIEW RECOVERY CENTER EASTERN OREGON ALCOHOLISM FOUNDATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES FORA HEALTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST YOUTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION THE HARBOR RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM SAMARITAN HEALTH SERVICES TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES UNION GOSPEL MISSION LIFECHANGE UNION GOSPEL MISSION LIFECHANGE VOLUNTEERS OF AMERICA OREGON MEN'S RESIDENTIAL CENTER VOLUNTEERS OF AMERICA OREGON HOME BASE RECOVERY
